title: Near-infrared Fluorescence Ocular Imaging (NIRFOI) of Alzheimer's Disease.
author: Yang J Yang J Li Y Xu Y Ran C
content: S-EPMC7673911 PMC7673911 Near-infrared Fluorescence Ocular Imaging (NIRFOI) of Alzheimer's Disease. PURPOSE:Near-infrared fluorescence (NIRF) imaging has been widely used in preclinical studies; however, its low tissue penetration represents a daunting problem for translational clinical imaging
